loadError.title: Could not load this file
loadError.description: We couldn't read "{{fileName}}" from disk. Saving is disabled until the file loads successfully, so we don't overwrite your real content.

footer.shortcuts: Press Ctrl+S to save • Esc to go back or close

binaryFile.title: Binary File
binaryFile.message: The file "{{fileName}}" cannot be displayed in the text editor because it is a binary file.

officePreview.disabledMessage: No Office file preview service is configured. Configure the Office file preview service in Settings, or download the file and open it locally.
officePreview.libreOfficeUnavailableMessage: This format requires LibreOffice for preview. Install LibreOffice, or switch the Office file preview service to None in Settings.
officePreview.failedMessage: Failed to generate Office file preview.

selection.noSelectableText: This preview does not contain selectable text.
